title: Lift The Broken

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Oh, the stars sing tonight,
Every breath feels so alive,
We gather here under this sky,
To heal, to love, to rise.
The shattered hearts, He binds them whole,
Filling cracks with rays of gold,
Clouds of sorrow, swept away,
Dawns of mercy, lead the day.
He counts each star, He calls their names,
In their glow, we burn our shame.
His love, unmeasured, uncontained,
A boundless force, a holy flame.
Sing it loud, let the world hear,
He lifts the broken, dries every tear.
In every star, His healing flows,
A love so vast, the universe knows.
The winds obey, the oceans sway,
Mountains tremble, skies obey.
His word creates, His hands restore,
A song of hope forevermore.
Oh, lift your voice, feel the light,
Turn the pain into flight.
With every step, the chains dissolve,
Dance to the rhythm of resolve.
Sing it loud, let the world hear,
He lifts the broken, dries every tear.
In every star, His healing flows,
A love so vast, the universe knows.
Oh, the stars sing tonight,
Every breath feels so alive,
We gather here under this sky,
To heal, to love, to rise.

epigraph: He healeth the broken in heart
styleNote: Dance-Pop Beat · Anthemic Melody · Layered Harmonies
